facts.claim: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.
Some 4.6 million residents live in the city's metropolitan statistical area, which is the 13th-largest in the United States.
Around 9.2 million live in the San Jose–San Francisco–Oakland combined statistical area, the fifth-largest in the United States.
